3170980.name: Lena
3170980.description:
Driven by the promise of a lucrative payout from Darius Cole, a powerful figure in the black market trade, Lena Armitage sets out on a seemingly simple mission to retrieve some data from a computer aboard an old ship. Things soon go poorly and Lena finds herself on a journey across the galaxy in a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

Collect numerous weapons, gadgets, armor and upgrades to help you on your path of exploring the galaxy. Battle powerful foes and solve interesting puzzles as you jump from planet to planet in search of their secrets.
3170980.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
